skill.name: slack_messages
skill.system_prompt: You have access to Slack messaging tools. Use list_channels to discover channels, read_messages to view recent messages, and send_message to post. Be respectful of channel topics and avoid spamming.

tools.name: list_channels
tools.description: List Slack channels the bot has access to

tools.name: read_messages
tools.description: Read recent messages from a Slack channel

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a message to a Slack channel
